dungeon: GENUINE ROTF SYSTEMS/CRAFTING GUIDE video set in a PURPLE-TILED VAULT/LABYRINTH dungeon. Heavy economy/crafting focus (Onrane currency, crate-unboxing, a forge/vault crafting system, marketplace), narrated with on-screen 'How to craft / How to use' overlays. LOW boss/combat yield; HIGH items + SYSTEMS yield.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+transitions: a PURPLE/BLUE BRICK-TILED VAULT/LABYRINTH — repeating boxy purple-brick rooms connected by corridors (a maze/vault layout), with loot/inventory windows opened frequently. One DARK BOSS ARENA holds a GOLDEN boss. Also a circular minimap room seen. Single-dungeon-type run (purple vault) rather than a multi-biome marathon.

Combat is incidental (purple vault navigation while narrating). Attacks limited to the golden vault-boss grid/wall pattern.
